name: AIM-120C
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine _G/weapons_table/weapons/missiles/AIM_120C.lua (DCS 2.9.16)
_notes: March-only motor. Thrust = Isp(234s)*(51.26kg/6.5s)*9.807=18097N. ccm_k0 not in weapons_table entry; estimated 0.3 for modern ARH (community consensus).

name: AIM-7MH
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine _G/weapons_table/weapons/missiles/AIM-7MH.lua (DCS 2.9.16)
_notes: Dual-stage: boost 25191N/3.7s, march 4141N/10.8s, avg 9516N. SARH chaff vulnerability 0.55 (chaff can break CW illuminator lock; higher than ARH).

name: AIM-9X
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine AIM_9X.lua: M=84.46, Nr_max=55, Mach_max=2.7, t_acc=5, D_max=11000m, ccm_k0=0.2.
_notes: DCS AIM-9X: 55G, Mach 2.7, 5s burn, 5.9nm range. Imaging IR seeker with excellent IRCCM (ccm_k0=0.2 from datamine). PN_gain=6.

name: R-77
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine P_77.lua: M=175, Nr_max=40, Mach_max=4, t_acc=3+t_marsh=6=9s total, Range_max=50000m, ccm_k0=0.2.
_notes: DCS R-77: 40G, Mach 4, 9s total burn (3s boost + 6s sustain), 27nm range. Grid fins add drag (Cx_pil=3.44). ccm_k0=0.2 confirmed.

name: R-27ER
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine _G/weapons_table/weapons/missiles/P_27PE.lua (DCS 2.9.16)
_notes: Boost 54780N/2.5s + march 34295N/5.5s, avg 42741N. SARH: chaff vulnerability 0.55 (same rationale as AIM-7MH). Primary defense is notching (doppler blind zone).

name: R-73
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine P_73.lua: M=105, Nr_max=45, Mach_max=2.8, t_acc=2+t_marsh=3=5s, Range_max=12000m, ccm_k0=0.5.
_notes: DCS R-73: 45G, Mach 2.8, 5s burn, 6.5nm range. ccm_k0=0.5 from datamine. SeekerGen=3, PN_gain=6.

name: MICA EM
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine MICA_R.lua: M=112, Nr_max=35, Mach_max=4, t_acc=4+t_marsh=4=8s, Range_max=45000m.
_notes: DCS MICA EM: 35G, Mach 4, 8s burn, 24.3nm range. ccm_k0 estimated 0.2 (modern ARH).

name: SD-10
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine _G/weapons_table/weapons/missiles/SD-10.lua (DCS 2.9.16). Dual-stage confirmed.
_notes: Boost 22783N/6s + march 6712N/4s, avg 16338N. S=0.03235m2. ccm_k0 not in published file; estimated 0.25 (modern ARH, slightly worse than R-77 based on community reports).

name: AIM-9J
_source: pydcs / USAF historical data. AIM-9J introduced 1977 with DSQ-29 seeker (uncooled, rear-aspect only).
_notes: Uncooled IR seeker, rear-aspect only. Must be pre-boresighted before launch. Very susceptible to flares (ccm_k0=0.92). Low gLimit (22G) reflects older airframe. seekerAcquisitionRange 1.5nm reflects short acquisition envelope. mass/thrust from pydcs AIM-9J entry.

name: AIM-9M
_source: DCS AIM-9M proxy via AIM-9JULI.lua. Similar airframe to AIM-9X but older seeker.
_notes: DCS AIM-9M: ~30G, Mach 2.7, 5s burn, 5.9nm range. Cooled IR, all-aspect. ccm_k0=0.70.

name: R.550 Magic 1
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine R_550_M1.lua: M=89, Mach_max=2.0, t_acc=2, Range_max=7000m.
_notes: DCS Magic 1: ~25G, Mach 2.0, 2s burn, 3.8nm range. Uncooled IR, rear-aspect only. ccm_k0=0.88.

name: R.550 Magic 2
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine R_550.lua: M=89, Nr_max=30, Mach_max=2.0, t_acc=1.88, Range_max=10000m.
_notes: DCS Magic 2: 30G, Mach 2.0, 1.88s burn, 5.4nm range. Cooled seeker, all-aspect. ccm_k0=0.55 estimated.

name: R-27ET
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine P_27TE.lua (DCS 2.9.16). Same dual-stage motor as R-27ER; IR seeker replaces SARH seeker.
_notes: IR variant of R-27ER. Motor identical: boost 54780N/2.5s + march 34295N/5.5s, avg 42741N. Mass slightly lighter than ER (~343kg vs 351kg, smaller seeker head). IR seeker limits acquisition range to ~7nm vs SARH unlimited illumination. ccm_k0=0.75 estimated (improved IR seeker generation but large body). Invisible to RWR unlike R-27ER.

name: R-60
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine R-60.lua: M=43, Nr_max=30, Mach_max=2.5, t_acc=3, Range_max=8000m.
_notes: DCS R-60: 30G, Mach 2.5, 3s burn, 4.3nm range. Uncooled IR, ccm_k0=0.90.

name: SA-18 Igla-S
_source: DCS SA-18 Igla-S. Similar class to Stinger; Nr_max estimated 18, Mach_max=2.2.
_notes: DCS Igla-S: 18G, Mach 2.2, 5s burn, 3nm range. Dual-wavelength IR. ccm_k0=0.70.

name: FIM-92 Stinger
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine FIM_92C.lua: M=10.1, Nr_max=18, Mach_max=2.2, t_acc=3+t_marsh=3=6s, Range_max=6000m.
_notes: DCS Stinger: 18G, Mach 2.2, 6s burn, 3.2nm range. ccm_k0=0.62.

name: Mistral
_source: Mistral SATCP (Sol-Air Très Courte Portée) MBDA specifications. Entered service 1988. DCS Mistral unit.
_notes: French IR SHORAD. IR-homing, all-aspect. Very high G-limit (25G) for a MANPAD class. ccm_k0=0.55 estimated (superior IRCCM to Soviet/US contemporaries per MBDA claims). 90mm body -> referenceArea=0.0064m2. Effective against low-altitude fixed-wing and helicopters.

name: SA-6 Kub
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine SA3M9M.lua: M=600, Nr_max=16, Mach_max=2.2, t_acc=4+t_marsh=22=26s, Range_max=25000m.
_notes: DCS SA-6: 16G, Mach 2.2, 26s burn, 13.5nm range. Mass 600kg. SARH. ccm_k0=0.50.

name: SA-11 Buk
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine SA9M38M1.lua: M=690, Nr_max=19, Mach_max=3.4, t_acc=4.5+t_marsh=15=19.5s, Range_max=46000m.
_notes: DCS SA-11: 19G, Mach 3.4, 19.5s burn, 24.8nm range. Mass 690kg. SARH illumination. ccm_k0=0.40.

name: SA-15 Tor
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine SA9M330.lua: M=165, Nr_max=16, Mach_max=3, t_acc=4+t_marsh=8=12s, Range_max=12000m.
_notes: DCS SA-15: 16G, Mach 3, 12s burn, 6.5nm range. SHORAD. ccm_k0=0.35.

name: S-300PS
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine SA5B55.lua: M=1600, Nr_max=16, Mach_max=6, t_acc=10.6, Range_max=75000m, D_max=40000m.
_notes: DCS S-300PS: 16G, Mach 6, 10.6s burn, 40.5nm range. ccm_k0=0.5 from datamine. Cx_pil=8.

name: R-60M
_source: Quaggles/dcs-lua-datamine R-60.lua proxy: M=45, Nr_max=30, Mach_max=2.5, t_acc=3, Range_max=8000m.
_notes: DCS R-60M: Same motor as R-60 (30G, Mach 2.5, 3s burn). Improved IR seeker. ccm_k0=0.75.
